programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Penny and Vinny have their first baby scan, Zoe tries to build bridges, and Zack faces financial problems.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Josh puts his best foot forward, Penny weighs up her options, and Vinny’s plans cause a stir.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Elaine and Ian remain at odds, Penny is given a choice, and the Truemans worry about Patrick.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Residents gather for the opening of Knight Fusion, Ian attempts to make amends, and Vicki and Ross think about wedding venues.

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: Romantic comedy about a high-powered career woman who forces her put-upon PA to marry her when she is threatened with deportation to Canada. With Immigration growing suspicious, the couple must convince the authorities they are engaged to be married and decide to take a weekend trip away together.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: Stacey and the team travel to Milton Keynes to help Bianca and Ollie Parej, parents of five children under nine, transform their cramped and chaotic home.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Sex, Bribes and Murder
programme.desc: An investigation into a viral prison sex tape leads journalist Mobeen Azhar to discover an illicit prison economy fuelled by inappropriate relationships, coercion and contraband.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Sex, Bribes and Murder
programme.desc: Mobeen’s investigation into prison corruption hears of the murder of a former officer who had been involved in uncovering an illicit relationship between a guard and an inmate.

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary prepares for her official debut in London society, buoyed by her friendship with Ann and the attentions of Mr Ryder. But a run-in with old rival Caroline Bingley threatens Mary’s growing confidence. Mary faces up to Caroline at a dinner party, but just as things seem to be going in the right direction for Mary, an urgent message from home throws everything into uncertainty.

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary rushes to Pemberley, fearing her mother is gravely ill, only to be thrown back into the demands of family life. Mary begins to lose hope of ever returning to London – until Mr Ryder unexpectedly turns up. His clear admiration for Mary helps her family recognise how much she has changed. As excitement mounts over Mr Ryder’s visit, Mary finds herself on the brink of a momentous decision.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Clive Myrie is in Kent with Tracey, a soon-to-be grandmother who is worried about her high blood pressure. His suggestion? Borrow a pet – yes, really. With new apps making it simple to match people with animals, Tracey could enjoy all the benefits without the long-term commitment. And the science is clear: spending time with animals boosts happiness, improves wellbeing and lowers the risk of dying from cardiovascular disease. A furry friend might be just what her heart needs.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martel and Nitro are duelling with each other over ideas at a studio flat in London. We delve into the archives all the way back to 2009, when Martin was charmed by a Grade II listed house in Devon. Martin is also in Somerset, where another character property is ripe for reinvention.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Dean restores a pair of shoes with a surprising past, Mark revives a retro recording device, and Sonnaz and Angelina pair up to salvage a battered survivor of heady days in London.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Julie Hesmondhalgh and her niece Rosa present an appeal on behalf of Ovarian Cancer Action, a charity funding vital research to improve early diagnosis, develop better treatments and ultimately save more women’s lives.

programme.title: King of Kings
programme.desc: This biblical epic concentrates on three main elements of the New Testament story - the life of Christ, the tensions between Herod's court and the Roman administration culminating in the execution of John the Baptist and, finally the story of Barabbas.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Game show in which 24 players compete to score points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the Impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day. In each episode, there are three rounds, and the three highest scorers from each round play against each other in the final. The winner of this battle faces a £10,000 question.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: In the ultimate knockout quiz, eight players do battle on the Tournament Run in a series of exciting tug-of-war quiz matches as they attempt to knock their opponents out of the game and steal their cash. Only one player will be left standing at the end, but can they make it all the way to the Golden Run to double their money? Hosted by Alex Scott.

programme.title: Coast
programme.desc: Coast ventures to the farthest-flung reaches of the British Isles to explore Life Beyond the Edge. Mark Horton is in Liverpool to meet an old friend. Brunel's famous ship, the Great Eastern, now lies beneath the mud, but Mark is resurrecting the story of her greatest triumph - how she conquered the Atlantic by connecting Britain's edge to America with 2,000 miles of telegraph wire. And Andy Torbet is on the island of Lewis attempting to follow in the footsteps of the sea shepherds, a style of farming that is slowly dying out.

programme.title: Funeral in Berlin
programme.desc: Harry Palmer is sent to Berlin with instructions to assist Colonel Stok, the Russian head of security for the Berlin Wall, who is eager to defect to the West. However, Palmer discovers he cannot trust anyone in the city where the double cross is a unit of currency.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and a team of experts examine curios and artefacts offered up by the public in Eston, Cleveland. Exciting finds include a sculpted elephant by Eduardo Paolozzi used to promote floor covering; a Victorian painting bought for five shillings while sheltering from the rain; the first commercially produced toy robot made in the 1930s; a collection of craft jewellery found in an old envelope at the end of a jumble sale; and a fibre-glass chair which Paul Atterbury says is 'an antique for the future'.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Flog It! is at Blackburn Cathedral in the centre of Blackburn in Lancashire. The cathedral was completed in 1926, formally the Church of St Mary. Experts Charles Hanson and Philip Serrell are on hand to find a selection of objects to take to auction. Charles values a wooden Fijian club, while two vintage enamel signs catch Philip’s eye. Paul Martin takes a look at the impressive Talbot collection – local press photographs taken of events, celebrities and the royal family over a 50-year period.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Every day this week, celebrity contestants Ahir Shah, Michaela Strachan, Dr Xand van Tulleken and Vogue Williams take on a series of quiz rounds selected by the host, quiz legend Richard Osman. A daily winner is declared following a quickfire round at the end of each show, and the scores are tallied across the week, resulting in an overall champion being crowned on Friday. Will the winning stars opt for the much-coveted House of Games suitcase, or will they be tempted with the House of Games bee hotel?

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Carole Baxter and Brian Cunningham are back at Beechgrove to kick off the season with a range of great jobs that can be done right now.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from Northern Ireland must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges: Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian and all-round food enthusiast Phil Wang. The guest judge is award-winning Belfast director Lisa Barros D’Sa, whose films Ordinary Love and Good Vibrations have already been celebrated in dishes earlier in the week. How will she judge dishes celebrating the British film industry? Only one of the chefs will triumph and go through to represent Northern Ireland at the national finals.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: With a long Easter weekend to look forward to, Monty is on hand with wheelbarrows of practical gardening advice and inspiration. For people who fancy growing their own potatoes, it's time to get them in the ground. He’ll also be sowing seeds for a colourful cut flower display and starting a new project to show how easy and inexpensive it is to create topiary from yew cuttings. Ashley Edwards heads to a magical spring garden in Horsham to share his love of the season of renewal. In Carmarthenshire, there’s a grower who gave up her job in London to follow her dream of becoming a flower farmer. Plus a gardener in Ely who is simply potty about pots.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Change sweeps across Xudum, and every big cat character must adapt to survive. The core of the Xudum lion pride has moved south, but a group of its young, opportunistic females has remained in the north. The crew is excited to find one of these lionesses has cubs, but as a first-time mum, she has a lot to learn. Cheetah mum Pobe experiences tragedy when a leopard attacks, but hope returns when her three-year-old daughter Neelo is found and is thriving. Lediba the leopard shows us there is more to her than meets the eye, but she’s under increasing pressure to catch large prey.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
programme.desc: Based on the true story of stockbroker Jordan Belfort, whose rise and fall involved drug-fuelled decadence, corruption and the making of a fortune from shady deals.

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Two years ago, the government banned XL bully dogs, promising it would save lives. Panorama investigates whether that commitment has been kept. Attacks are still happening, the police say the law is difficult to enforce, and some animal charities say they are overwhelmed with abandoned dogs. Reporter Sam Poling hears from families who have lost loved ones after XL attacks and from owners struggling to stay on the right side of the law.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from Northern Ireland must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges: Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian and all-round food enthusiast Phil Wang. The guest judge is award-winning Belfast director Lisa Barros D’Sa, whose films Ordinary Love and Good Vibrations have already been celebrated in dishes earlier in the week. How will she judge dishes celebrating the British film industry? Only one of the chefs will triumph and go through to represent Northern Ireland at the national finals.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Change sweeps across Xudum, and every big cat character must adapt to survive. The core of the Xudum lion pride has moved south, but a group of its young, opportunistic females has remained in the north. The crew is excited to find one of these lionesses has cubs, but as a first-time mum, she has a lot to learn. Cheetah mum Pobe experiences tragedy when a leopard attacks, but hope returns when her three-year-old daughter Neelo is found and is thriving. Lediba the leopard shows us there is more to her than meets the eye, but she’s under increasing pressure to catch large prey.

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: A weekly programme from the BBC World Service, bringing forensic journalism from all corners of the world by BBC Eye, the World Service's critically acclaimed investigative unit, and featuring expert global correspondents getting to the heart of the biggest international stories. This week, the Eye team reveals how soaring global demand for eel has fuelled a vast illegal trade worth billions, exposing criminal networks, trafficking routes and controversial deals. Plus Rebecca Henschke reports from Indonesia on how the archipelago’s extraordinary natural wealth is under renewed threat.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Stories start appearing in the berg’s weekly newspaper about the Piripenguin friends. The Piris end up arguing with each other and quickly agree that they need to find the secret gossiper!

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Cosima is so excited to tell Big Lizard about her life on earth that she doesn't realise he has something exciting to say to her.

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: The eagle family are performing synchronised flight. The ducklings are blown away and join the eagle family, who teach them how to fly in formation. Weasy feels left out and finds a way to fly 'for real' so that he can also take part.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Herbert is starting to feel his age and secretly drinks from the Fountain of Youth. However, his desire to be young puts the whole quest in jeopardy.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings set up a mini-fair, but Grizzy steals the Lemmings' tickets.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck has to deliver pizzas around the town, but he hasn’t reckoned with the lengths that Frog will go to to get them all for himself.

programme.title: Game on Grandparents
programme.desc: Pro gamer Jelly guides the teams in an exhilarating WRC race. Who will cross the finish line first in this nail-biting battle?

programme.title: Bro's in Control
programme.desc: Adam and Joe deliver Callum his dinner in style - via hovercraft and off-road driving. But will Callum’s burger arrive intact? Back in the kitchen, viral foodies Yinrun and Max La Manna become helping hands as Adam and Joe prepare Callum a delicious meal. One bro will be jumping for joy as he celebrates the win while the other will be jumping, too - but attached to a bungee cord!

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Nitro, Cyclone, Legend and Sabre dare each other to do silly things at a restaurant and obey rivals’ outrageous instructions for the chance to win or tap out and risk losing.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall goes in search of one of Europe’s most venomous snakes: the nose-horned viper. He also hopes to track down a bear and goes deep into a cave system to find a dragon.

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Topical news magazine for children.

programme.title: Gardeners' World
programme.desc: With a long Easter weekend to look forward to, Monty is on hand with wheelbarrows of practical gardening advice and inspiration. For people who fancy growing their own potatoes, it's time to get them in the ground. He’ll also be sowing seeds for a colourful cut flower display and starting a new project to show how easy and inexpensive it is to create topiary from yew cuttings. Ashley Edwards heads to a magical spring garden in Horsham to share his love of the season of renewal. In Carmarthenshire, there’s a grower who gave up her job in London to follow her dream of becoming a flower farmer. Plus a gardener in Ely who is simply potty about pots.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for Northern Ireland with blockbuster canapes, starters and fish dishes celebrating the British film industry. The dishes are judged by this week's veteran judges, 2025's banquet winners Sally Abe and Jean Delport, and include an homage to The School for Good and Evil that features a red knotted brioche handkerchief, and a tribute to director Lisa Barros D'Sa with barbecued monkfish served from a teapot. Who will impress, and who will be sent home?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three talented chefs from Northern Ireland are halfway through their heat, and the pressure is mounting. Once again, they each serve a unique take on the brief celebrating the British film industry and films with links to Northern Ireland. The dishes are judged by veteran judges Jean Delport and Sally Abe. They include a roast chicken tribute to Kenneth Branagh's adaptation of Murder on the Orient Express, as well as two desserts inspired by the film Good Vibrations. But who will be leaving the competition?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is in the magnificent Cairngorms, property-shopping with a couple who, after exploring the UK in their camper van for the last two years, have decided that the Scottish countryside is where they want to settle. Nicki also visits a company making sustainable, timber frame houses from locally sourced materials, before meeting the proud owners who live in one of them.

programme.title: Earth's Great Rivers
programme.desc: A look at the astonishing wildlife, landscapes and people of the Nile. From elephants and leopards to ancient wonders, its great length is a lifeline for wildlife and cultures.

programme.title: Death on the Nile
programme.desc: Agatha Christie's classic whodunnit. The great Belgian detective Hercule Poirot cannot believe how many enemies beautiful American heiress Linnett Ridgeway has made. When she is murdered on her honeymoon cruise, Poirot has only one problem - everybody on board could have done it, and everybody had a reason for doing it.

programme.title: Inside Britain's National Parks
programme.desc: Pembrokeshire Coast National Park offers breathtaking views of rugged shorelines, sandy beaches, and offshore islands. The Park is home to numerous seabird colonies, including guillemots and the endangered puffin, and the park’s many bays provide a safe haven for grey seals and their pups. Beyond the coast, a diverse landscape of marshes, with salt and freshwater meadows support a variety of rare mammals and birds.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Lauren Price faces off against Stephanie Pineiro.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: As the 80s come to a close, the Top of the Pops vaults open once more to offer up the movers, shakers and chart toppers of 1989. This compilation looks back at performances by established megastars Tina Turner and Phil Collins, all-conquering funki dreds Soul II Soul, dance queen Paula Abdul, northern soul girl Lisa Stansfield and wry vocal group The Beautiful South. Madchester favourites Stone Roses and Happy Mondays also put in an appearance along with Stock Aitken and Waterman stalwarts Kylie Minogue, Jason Donovan and Sonia, not forgetting Sydney Youngblood, Mike and The Mechanics, Rebel MC and Double Trouble, plus duets from strange bedfellows Marc Almond and Gene Pitney, and Linda Ronstadt and Aaron Neville.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: The start of a new decade - and a new era - as hip-hop, dance and indie begin to find a place in the mainstream charts. Top of the Pops continued to present the biggest stars every Thursday to the British public, with lots of dry ice, hand-held cameras and a small but noisy studio audience. This compilation celebrates performances of some of the biggest hits of 1990, including breakout appearances by Adamski featuring Seal, Vanilla Ice, Beats International, EMF, The KLF, Primal Scream and Snap!. Plus plenty of girl power from Betty Boo, Sinead O’Connor, Maria McKee, En Vogue, Kylie and Tina Turner.

programme.title: The Beasts
programme.desc: Middle-aged French couple Antoine and Olga have moved to an inland Galician hamlet, happy to live off the land and renovate some dilapidated properties and intending to settle down, but a conflict with their neighbours reaches the point of no return. In French and Spanish with English subtitles

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: Carey is under pressure to charge James Whitlock, with Pierson keen for them to work together to close the case. Both soon find they have other problems to deal with, and Whitlock is left to Latif and Tan to 'break'. Carey’s inability to reach Napier leads to her facing the consequences of her actions, and through Danny Hart, an unlikely group of allies presents itself. Pierson is also facing the consequences of his actions and must convince his colleagues that he is fit for the job. Meanwhile, an off-the-record military group known as ‘E-Squadron’ seek advice from the mysterious Simon on how to get their plans back on track. Simon suggests ‘executive action’, and a deadly trap is set for Rachel Carey.

programme.title: Clash of the Superpowers: America vs China
programme.desc: Taiwan becomes a dangerous flashpoint as the battle for supremacy ramps up. Trump’s first term ends with relations with China at their lowest point for years as both countries deal with the devastating consequences of the Covid pandemic – or, as Trump called it, ‘the China plague.’ Xi’s government have high hopes for Trump’s successor, Joe Biden, but these are dashed after a frosty meeting in Alaska. Biden sparks further anger in Beijing when he signs a nuclear submarine deal with Australia and the UK, and takes on China over tech – before speaker Nancy Pelosi’s visit to Taiwan brings the two superpowers closer than ever to military confrontation. Tensions remain high as Donald Trump takes over for his second term, throwing world politics into disarray. Top interviewees include US national security adviser Jake Sullivan, speaker of the House of Representatives Nancy Pelosi, UK prime minister Boris Johnson, Australian prime minister Scott Morrison and Taiwan’s foreign minister David Lee, as well as top Chinese academics who give the inside track from Beijing.

programme.title: This is BBC Two
programme.desc: Highlights of programmes on BBC Two.

programme.title: Make It at Market
programme.desc: Stepping into the beautiful gardens in Oxfordshire today are Jaycee from West Sussex and Tristan from Perthshire, both hoping to turn their love for their crafts into successful businesses. Ex-HR worker Jaycee made the brave decision to give up the day job to concentrate full time on her upcycling business and hopes that Dom and his team of mentors can help. Mentor Zoe is worried that Jaycee is focusing on the wrong items and is keen for her to rethink her way forward. For stone carver Tristan, it’s all about finding his confidence as mentor Louis tries to convince him to get out there and really sell his pieces. Both makers are given eight weeks to put their mentors’ advice into practice. But can they make enough money to follow their dreams and turn their passions and skills into profits?

programme.title: The A to Z of TV Gardening
programme.desc: Carol Kirkwood takes an alphabetical journey through the world of television gardening, getting inspiration and advice from some of the BBC's most popular gardening presenters and programmes. In this episode, she explores subjects that all begin with the letter B.

programme.title: Take a Hike
programme.desc: This week, we’re in the Highlands and Islands of Scotland, home to many of the country’s 30,000 lochs and to five keen walkers, all hoping to win the coveted golden walking stick. Today, it’s the turn of 60-year-old opera singer Tony, who’s lived near Inverness for the past 16 years. But it’s a coastal trek that he’s chosen, starting at Cromarty on the stunning east coast of Scotland. It’s not everyone’s idea of a beauty spot. Although known as a fishing port, Cromarty harbour has been repurposed to repair oil rigs. The combination of uncompromising hunks of steel and the rugged coastline makes for an unusual skyline! So what surprises does Tony have in store to convince the group that his is the winning walk?

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Sean Fletcher and Anita Rani head to St Michael’s Mount in Cornwall after Storm Goretti, one of the most destructive storms to hit the county in decades. Hurricane-force winds ripped through the island, stripping away nearly 80 per cent of its trees and leaving the tiny community of just 33 residents facing a huge clean-up. With Easter approaching, they join the race to repair the damage, restore the landscape and reopen this iconic landmark to visitors. Also in the programme, Datshiane Navanayagam investigates the rise of youth homelessness in rural Britain.

programme.title: Landward
programme.desc: A special episode to celebrate Landward’s 50th anniversary. Dougie takes a long walk through the landscape and through five decades of this important rural affairs series. He revisits stories from the archives, revealing huge changes in the Scottish countryside. The Landward cameras documented vanishing ways of life and key moments, from devastating animal disease outbreaks to historic land buyouts and extreme weather events. We learn that what began as ‘Scotland’s farming programme’ became a broader reflection of all aspects of living and working in rural Scotland. Dougie meets up with past and present members of the Landward team as they share their best moments from working on the programme.

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Carole Baxter and Brian Cunningham are back at Beechgrove to kick off the season with a range of great jobs that can be done right now.

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Best Bites
programme.desc: Richard Bainbridge gives roast lamb a makeover with his crispy lamb scrumpets served alongside a wild garlic salsa verde and roasted little gem lettuce. Judy Joo brings the flavours of Korea to an American classic with her kimchi mac and cheese, packed full of four cheeses and finished with a crispy panko topping. Helen McGinn has the ultimate rundown on what wines pair best with each type of chocolate for Easter. Emily Scott embraces the best of Cornish produce with her clotted cream, wild garlic and cider mussels, before Hasan Semay whips up his poached rhubarb and pistachio tart. Meanwhile, Rick Stein visits Jekka McVicar for a lesson in growing herbs, and Clive Myrie gets ready to party as he heads to Santiago’s carnival! Finally, Mel Giedroyc tucks into either her food heaven, squid, or her food hell, kidney.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from Northern Ireland must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. They need to impress a panel of exacting judges: Michelin-starred chef Tom Kerridge, former Great British Menu Champion of Champions Lorna McNee, and comedian and all-round food enthusiast Phil Wang. The guest judge is award-winning Belfast director Lisa Barros D’Sa, whose films Ordinary Love and Good Vibrations have already been celebrated in dishes earlier in the week. How will she judge dishes celebrating the British film industry? Only one of the chefs will triumph and go through to represent Northern Ireland at the national finals.

programme.title: Easter Parade
programme.desc: Star performer Don Hewes hires Hannah Brown as his new dance partner to prove to his former partner that he can make a star of anyone. Classic musical with Irving Berlin's score, including the songs Easter Parade and We're a Couple of Swells.

programme.title: High Society
programme.desc: Musical comedy. Time is short if playboy CK Dexter-Haven is to reclaim his former wife before she remarries. Cynical reporter Mike Connor is covering the wedding.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A young tigress is chosen to found a new dynasty. Airlifted from her home in an Indian park to life in a new reserve, Baghani the tigress must fight with leopards for territory and learn to hunt dangerous wild boar. Also released is Rajore, a hot-blooded young male. For two years, every aspect of their lives is followed by the camera. Will they mate and start a family, or will they be killed by poachers?

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: This edition presents a collection of some of the best unseen finds from this series, visiting the Milestones Museum in Basingstoke, Ragely Hall in Warwickshire, the National Maritime Museum Cornwall in Falmouth and the RAF museum in Hendon, London. Our antiques experts look at a diverse range of items, from a stunning art nouveau necklace to a pair of British railway lamps.

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Callum needs to haggle hard to get a good price for his calves from a mainland buyer, while Zara’s morning cattle check brings devastating news. Andrew feels under pressure to make the farm pay more so that his dad can take a step back, but right now it's all hands to the pump while pregnant Gayle has been signed off work. And Noah wants a future in farming, but he needs to balance lambing with exam revision.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Change sweeps across Xudum, and every big cat character must adapt to survive. The core of the Xudum lion pride has moved south, but a group of its young, opportunistic females has remained in the north. The crew is excited to find one of these lionesses has cubs, but as a first-time mum, she has a lot to learn. Cheetah mum Pobe experiences tragedy when a leopard attacks, but hope returns when her three-year-old daughter Neelo is found and is thriving. Lediba the leopard shows us there is more to her than meets the eye, but she’s under increasing pressure to catch large prey.

programme.title: Burma with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The second of a two-part series, in which adventurer and broadcaster Simon Reeve travels deeper into beautiful and troubled Burma. Simon journeys up the vast Irrawaddy River to the old royal capital of Mandalay, home to an exotic market for precious jade. In Burma's mountainous highlands, he experiences the country's vibrant ethnic heritage at an extraordinary and explosive fire-balloon festival, then visits an elephant sanctuary and finds out how a growing tourism industry is helping them survive after working for decades in the logging industry. Burma is a melting pot of different ethnic groups, and having seen first-hand the suffering of the Rohingya people on the first leg of his journey, Simon now travels secretly into one of Burma's many other conflict zones to meet a huge rebel army who have been fighting the Burmese military for decades. Simon goes on combat patrol into the jungle with the rebels and learns why they have been fighting the longest-running civil war in the world.

programme.title: Pilgrimage
programme.desc: Seven well known personalities of differing faiths and beliefs set off on a unique 390km series of trails through the stunning landscapes of north east England to explore the lives of early Celtic Christian saints. They trek through the heart of Northumberland and the Scottish Borders along a curated network of trails celebrating three of England’s seventh-century northern saints – Hild, Oswald and Cuthbert. During the journey, they encounter Whitby’s famous cliff-top abbey and two of the most important pilgrimage sites in north east England – the Unesco site of Durham Cathedral and their final destination, the Holy Island of Lindisfarne.

programme.title: The Imitation Game
programme.desc: During the Second World War, mathematician Alan Turing and his team of cryptographers set out to decipher the German Enigma code.

programme.title: Being There
programme.desc: Chance, a simple-minded gardener, has spent all his life in the Washington DC house of an old man. When the man dies, Chance is put out on the street with no knowledge of the world except what he has learned from television. After a run in with a limousine, he ends up a guest of a woman and her husband, Ben, an influential but sickly businessman. Chance becomes friend and confidante to Ben, and an unlikely political insider.

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Tune every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: The Farmer receives a mystery gift from his antipodean cousin. Unimpressed with the present, he attempts to throw it away, only for it to keep reappearing. He becomes convinced it has magical powers.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Our dynamic duo take on a shoddy army of knock-offs when alien Quark's latest money-making scheme is to create cheap copies of Danger Mouse and Penfold.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: The heroes aren’t really meant to do quests without Mr Friendlyface’s express permission. But when they come across a cute little squirrel queen, and she begs for their help, they find her impossible to resist. All they have to do is quest to the Tree of Certain Doom and pass his challenges. But the squirrel queen is not who she appears to be, and the heroes have to quickly un-quest their quest.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: When Boy, Girl and Cheese learn that their animal siblings have a tough time going through life with their unwieldy tails, they want to understand what it's like. So Mouse builds them mechanical tails to wear, and the three soon learn just how hard it is to do simple tasks. However, they come to master their tails well enough to attend the Curling Tail festival, where all tailed animals celebrate themselves. But when the kids turn their tails to full power to fit in better, they go haywire! They're now in danger of ruining the festival and being discovered as frauds!

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Topical news magazine for children.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton's pet amoeba Spot has puppies.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The Odd Squad investigates strange events. When every agent turns into a puppy, it's up to agent Ohlm to save the day.

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: JJ applies for an elite sporting school. However, not realising it's miles away from Beanotown, he needs to do badly in the sporting assessment to get out of it.

programme.title: Danny and Mick
programme.desc: The leisure centre is hosting a roller disco later that afternoon and Joy tells Danny and Mick if they want to be at the disco they need to finish every job on her list first. Danny spots a way to get some skating practice in and finish the jobs in double quick time – by doing all their work on wheels! Unfortunately, when a runaway Danny crashes through the disco it looks like the whole thing might be off. Can Mick save the day?

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: The Guardians are Santa Claus, the Easter Bunny, the Tooth Fairy and the Sandman. Their job, as well as bringing happiness to children around the world, is to protect them. When the evil spirit Pitch comes to Earth, bringing an army of nightmares with him, the Guardians spring into action to protect the children while they sleep. But Pitch is powerful, and they need help from a reluctant new team member: the impish spirit of winter, Jack Frost. Featuring the voices of Chris Pine (Jack Frost), Alec Baldwin (North), Jude Law (Pitch), Isla Fisher (Tooth), Hugh Jackman (Bunny) and Dakota Goyo (Jamie Bennett).

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Captain Barnacles and Peso become lost in a dangerous maze of underwater caves while helping a baby octopus get home, and the rest of the Octonauts must rescue them!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he is his conscience.

programme.title: Counterfeit Cat
programme.desc: Gark's powers get out of control when he helps Max with some unnecessary tasks.

programme.title: Girl Troop vs Aliens
programme.desc: Pippa, Kiara and Ruby race to call for help, Tilda is trapped aboard the spaceship, and Ginny faces a tough choice, all while Brighthawk Camp waits out the alien threat.

programme.title: High Hoops
programme.desc: When Aoife needs a cheerleading teacher to impress her auntie Fidelma, she finds help from an unlikely source - but can she keep up the act?

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: There’s heart-pumping action in Ouchology, and Dr Xand enters a giant blister to help explain why we get them! And in Bodytricks, we learn a cool trick that will amaze your friends.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Herbert is really proud of the plants he has grown ready for a visit from The Complete Gnome Gardener magazine. However, when a Wind Dragon flies through the forest destroying all his hard work, Herbert turns to desperate measures – a barrowful of Stinkweasel’s stinkiest compost! Now, the whole forest is at risk of being overwhelmed by the smell, and the heroes must quest to get rid of it.

programme.title: Ninja Express
programme.desc: The Ninjas must use their imagination when Anna orders a new toy as a birthday present for her father - a toymaker who's already invented every toy imaginable!

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Josh's brother shows up at the studio unannounced with some surprising news. When Zara realizes her split focus is affecting her chances at a coveted solo, she is forced to choose between her two passions. Heather and Piper feel their lack of hip-hop skills could hurt the team, so they enlist Henry's help to turn things around.

programme.title: High Hoops
programme.desc: The Vipers face a crisis of confidence, but Aoife’s attempts to help them go too far - can they stop her from total humiliation at the school’s talent competition?

programme.title: Bro's in Control
programme.desc: Celebs Viggo Venn and Phil Green come to the aid of Adam and Joe as they try to prove to Callum who is the most talented. With impressions and dad dancing, what’s not to like?

programme.title: Bro's in Control
programme.desc: Callum levels up this challenge with a massive inflatable assault course in the back garden. Who is the bounciest bro and who is just full of hot air? Only Callum can decide.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: When Timmy sees a particularly grumpy farmer giving one of the flock a hard time, he decides to give him an idea of what it's like to be a sheep. But when the time comes to have the old farmer back, things aren't quite so simple.

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Torn between practising Blamjitsu with the yeti and helping the Dinmakers write a new school song, JJ tries to combine the two by bringing the yeti along to band practice disguised as a very hairy roadie.

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: Mr Friendlyface is particularly tetchy this morning. He is packing for a skiing trip, but a dragon has pinched his golden fleece, and he urgently needs the heroes to quest it back – how else will he stay warm and cosy on the slopes? However, when the heroes accidentally agree to let his niece Trixie tag along with them, they fear that her clumsiness and lack of hero skills will ruin everything.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: Dog decides to show the family that he can be as tough as the wolves they are watching on TV. He joins a gang of street dogs and soon becomes leader of the pack. Meanwhile, the rest of the kids worry when Dog doesn’t come home and go out looking for him. However, they find that he is now too cool to be part of the 'old' family - until he is forced to make a choice between loyalty to the pack and loyalty to his best friend Boy.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings organise a sand yacht race and put a sleeping Grizzy on one of the yachts.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: When Duck accidentally gets a job as the band conductor at the local park, Frog is keen to play trumpet in the band - but Duck is even more keen to stop him!

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck and Frog must move a famous pop star’s possessions from one mansion to another. However, they are unable to do it with anything remaining in one piece.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, and the secret formula is taken as evidence!

programme.title: What's New Scooby-Doo?
programme.desc: Shaggy wins a tour of the Scooby Snacks factory, and the gang must battle a monster.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: When Ozzie catches bad-luck-itis, Orli and Osgood must go on a magical quest to find the ingredients for the antidote before his increasing bad luck blows apart HQ.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Cyborg and Beast Boy face off over burgers and burritos.

programme.title: Total Dramarama
programme.desc: When Duncan destroys the school, Chef ends up with a big cash settlement. However, rather than rebuilding the school, he takes the kids on a road trip to Splashville Waterpark.

programme.title: Blue Peter
programme.desc: It's Musical's Week and three lucky competition winners go behind the scenes to meet the stars of Strictly!

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall heads to Timor Leste in search of the biggest animal to have ever lived - the blue whale. He also hopes to find the saltwater crocodile, one of the giants of land.

programme.title: My Life
programme.desc: Tomi, a 12‑year‑old Irish dance star, trains hard for the upcoming World Championships. With two titles already, can he keep his winning streak alive?

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Tune every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Tune every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: When the Farmer accidentally drills a hole in a waterpipe while putting up a new shelf, Bitzer frantically tries to stop the leak from soaking the living room and prevent the Farmer’s precious teapots from sliding off the shelf!

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Animated series. Danger Mouse is forced to choose between dedication to duty and friendship when he battles the Baron in his underwater Toadlantis base.

programme.title: Dennis & Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Walter launches his own mega-dull, hypnotic TV channel with a signal booster that swamps all other channels! Rubi helps Dennis set up his own TV channel with a more powerful booster to free the residents of Beanotown from Walter's TV trance. Who will win the battle for ratings?

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: Everybody gets jealous when Boy bakes amazing cookies that he only shares with his new pen pal, Gretchen. They band together and pretend to be Gretchen, writing letters to Boy and asking him to send more cookies, which they then intercept and eat for themselves. However, when Boy asks to meet Gretchen in person, Girl, Dog, Cat, Mouse and Cheese come up with a plan to impersonate her and steal Boy's cookie recipe once and for all!

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Topical news magazine for children.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: A gang of kids steal the Krusty Krab's grill.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a sceptre that covers anything it touches in gold.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck is at the museum to give a really boring talk about dinosaurs. When Frog steps in, he somehow manages to hatch a baby dinosaur from an ancient egg.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: When Duck gets a job as a baker, Frog realises he can get free treats! However, a mix-up with the dough causes a birthday cake to grow out of control!

programme.title: Counterfeit Cat
programme.desc: Max needs to find the truth about why Staring Dog can’t take his eyes off him.

programme.title: Bro's in Control
programme.desc: Adam and Joe finally find out which bro is funnier as they take to the stage and perform their best comedy acts to a huge crowd of kids.

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Dynamite ruins a celebrity masterpiece when Nitro and Comet team up to turn the art world upside down in a hilarious paint-splattered prank!

programme.title: Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold, two primary school friends, create an imaginary superhero called Captain Underpants. When their principal, Mr Krupp, attempts to split up their friendship, they hypnotise him into believing that he is the pants-wearing crusader of their imaginations.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: The Bob's Burgers Movie
programme.desc: A feature-length spin-off from the cult animated TV series. When a ruptured water main creates an enormous sinkhole right in front of Bob's Burgers, it blocks the entrance indefinitely and ruins the Belchers' plans for a successful summer - as Bob and Linda struggle to keep the business afloat, the kids try to solve a mystery that could save their family's restaurant. With dangers mounting, these underdogs help each other find hope and fight to get back behind the counter where they belong.

programme.desc: Animated series based on the DC Comics superhero team. Raven learns a lot about her father when she returns to Azarath to help Trigon and Nana at their family bookstore.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Animated series inspired by the classic Looney Tunes shorts. Sylvester is all in when he spots Tweety Bird in a casino, and Beaky Buzzard learns that love can hurt.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo! Mystery Incorporated
programme.desc: Crystal Cove is threatened by a herd of horribly mutated cattle, and the gang must work out who is behind the plot.

programme.title: Buying the View
programme.desc: House-hunting show that explores luxury listings in majestic mountain ranges, sprawling beaches, and glittering urban skylines. George is looking for a Manhattan apartment with enough room to dress his clients and with an inspiring view, but buying in downtown New York City with a budget of one-and-a-half million dollars means that estate agent Kash will have challenges ahead.

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. It's another busy week for the Shepherds as they head on a family trip to Bournemouth to see how Chatty is getting on in rehab - while Billie and Greg finally head off on a romantic break to celebrate their anniversary after a dramatic few months, Chatty finishes his time in rehab and the Shepherds welcome him home as he moves in with the family and starts the next stage of his recovery.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: The show where people hope to find true love through their love of food - one lucky celebrity gets the chance to find romance as they enjoy three very special meals cooked for them by three very special blind dates. In this episode, reality TV personality and TOWIE star Diags is going to be given five menus, each of which has been put together by a potential blind date - the five women behind the menus have all come up with a three-course meal, but Diags will only be having dinner with three of them. Diags will choose his dates based on the menus that he most likes the look of, but who will he want to see for seconds when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done?

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Part-animated family adventure comedy featuring the lovable character created by American author EB White. In New York City, you will come across a small house, home to a family known as the Littles. One day, Fredrick and Eleanor Little head to an orphanage to find a brother for their son George - in the process of doing so, they meet Stuart, a small and charming mouse who is civilised like a human. The Littles adopt him and nearly everybody loves him, but there is one problem - the family cat.

programme.desc: Animated adventure comedy sequel. New York zoo animals Alex the lion, Marty the zebra, Melman the giraffe and Gloria the hippo are still stranded on Madagascar - when they try to leave the island, they end up crash-landing into the wilderness of an African nature reserve instead. As the gang meet others of their own kind, Alex discovers that he is a prince of a lion pride but has trouble communicating with his newfound family - will Alex accept his new position and end up staying in Africa?

Elma recruits Saff, Jordan, Freddie and Dani to help - following their recent dramas, Saff, Harry, Liv and Freddie then come face to face at the party. Amidst the drama, there is a new face on the scene as Amy's newly single brother Wills heads out to dinner with Amy, Billy, Jordan and Sophie - Amy thinks Wills could be a good match for Elma, but when she mentions this to Elma, Saff reveals that she has history with Wills.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: There is cause for celebration in Essex as Dani finally passes her driving test on her seventh attempt - to celebrate Dani's success, Saff throws her a congratulatory party and includes Junaid on the invite list, but Dani is not impressed that Junaid is there. Picking up on the awkward atmosphere, Junaid decides to leave but not before congratulating his old friend - Saff witnesses this conversation and decides to leave the party with Junaid. Elsewhere at Dani's party, tensions also simmer when Liv and Freddie come face to face for the first time since their heated conversation - Liv approaches Freddie and admits that things got out of control as the two try to bury the hatchet. Meanwhile, Saff and Ella bump into Wills at his flower stall and the girls have a bit of flirty banter with him - Ella tells Saff that Wills is a bit of her and Saff admits that she still finds him sexy. The girls joke that they can fight for him, but they also know that Elma has caught his eye too.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Love is in the air in Essex as it's Junaid and Joe's one-year anniversary - they celebrate with a night away in a lodge and reflect on their relationship and how far they've come. When they return home, there is a package waiting for them from Harry - as the pair work out if it is a goodwill gesture or if it will sour their celebrations, Saff, Ella, Elma and Wills play padel and the new lothario finds that he has got his work cut out with these three strong single women. Elsewhere, Diags opens up to Dan about his future with Jodie - things have been looking good and they have been happier than ever, but not everything may be as rosy as it seems. Meanwhile, Amy and Jordan decide to stage an intervention between Harry and Saff as the pair have been on bad terms since the Portugal trip - Harry and Saff have always managed to resolve their issues, but they may have gone too far this time to find a way back.

programme.desc: The second feature-length spin-off from the classic sitcom. Things are bad at the Steptoes' Shepherd's Bush rag-and-bone business - so bad, in fact, that Harold, who is always on the lookout for ways to improve his lot, invests his father's life savings in a greyhound who is almost blind and can't see the hare. When this plot fails, Harold is convinced that Albert must die so he can collect the old man's life insurance, so he asks him to play along with his latest bright idea...

programme.title: Carry On... Don't Lose Your Head
programme.desc: British comedy in which the Carry On team have an irreverent poke at the French Revolution. In 1789 Paris, two English noblemen called Sir Rodney Ffing and Lord Darcy take it upon themselves to rescue their French counterparts from the clutches of the revolting masses, Citizen Robespierre, and the notorious Madame Guillotine. The Black Fingernail and his sidekick prove elusive, but Camembert - the chief of the secret police - and his comrade Bidet are determined to track them down...

programme.title: Carry On Girls
programme.desc: Bawdy British comedy. In one of the later Carry On films, local businessman and councillor Sidney Fiddler convinces the town council of a rundown seaside resort to stage a beauty contest by persuading them that it will be a marvellous publicity stunt - however, the idea meets with fervent opposition from the local Women's Liberation group, who are led by the fearsome Councillor Prodworthy, as they attempt to sabotage the contest.

programme.title: Carry On Dick
programme.desc: Bawdy British comedy. It is 1750 and King George has set up the Bow Street Runners to combat the increase in crime - many highwaymen are captured, but not Dick Turpin, the most notorious of all. While disguised as a rector, his maid, and an organ player respectively, Dick and his accomplices are terrorising the countryside around Upper Dencher. Sir Roger Daley is determined to catch them at all costs with the help of Captain Fancey and Sergeant Jock Strapp, but will they escape Roger's grasp?

programme.title: Carry On Abroad
programme.desc: Classic British comedy. A package holiday abroad turns into a hilarious adventure for some unlucky holidaymakers - staying at the shoddy Palace Hotel on the island of Elsbels, they are disrupted by bad plumbing, a restaurant filled with mosquitoes, and a dawn chorus of cement mixers. All of this is on top of several intermarital and extramarital complications and misunderstandings during the stay - will all be well, or will all be hell? Innuendos and gags abound in this very British romp.

programme.title: Carry On Matron
programme.desc: Classic British comedy with the Carry On team about a gang's plan to raid a maternity hospital to steal a gigantic stock of birth control pills. One of the gang gets the lie of the land by disguising himself as a nurse, but the hospital's hypochondriac head doctor - who begins to make amorous advances towards him - and a formidable matron prove constant obstacles to the heist.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a GP who relocates to the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn. Martin is called to Louisa's new home after she has a dizzy spell while shifting furniture - Martin urges her to slow down but is then shocked to learn that Louisa has applied to be her school's headteacher again. Martin is asked to join the interview panel for the headteacher position as a school governor, but his invitation is withdrawn when he makes it clear that he thinks that Louisa is now unsuited for the role - meanwhile, the Doc treats an elegant elderly couple who want a disabled persons' parking permit so they can park near the shops, Al needs some money fast and offers to sort out all Louisa's household and plumbing problems if she can pay him before the weekend, the school secretary comes to Martin complaining of hay fever, and Edith brings Martin an ingenious gift to help him get the surgeon's job in London - however, the well-intended present ends up having unexpected consequences...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a GP who relocates to the sleepy Cornish hamlet of Portwenn. Martin visits London to meet with Robert Dashwood, the leader of the selection process for the prestigious London surgeon's job that he has applied for - while on the train back to Cornwall, Martin is annoyed to be seated next to local sheep farmer Jim Selkirk. When Jim slumps onto Martin's shoulder after he falls asleep, Martin discovers that he has died of heart failure - after returning to Portwenn, Martin is visited by Jim's widow as she looks for emotional comfort. When the widow then starts to see visions of her dead husband and collapses in a sheep pen, Martin is able to uncover the medical reason behind her hallucinations - meanwhile, Joan's punishment of a naughty schoolboy on an educational trip leads to a threatening letter from a solicitor when the boy's family accuse her of causing an illness in their son. Can the Doc identify the real source of the sickness and clear Joan's name?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. The brutal murder of a village postman leads Barnaby to a hotbed of adultery within remote Goodman's Land - as more murders rock the tiny hamlet, can community WPC Jay Nash help untangle the web of sexual liaisons to find the killer?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Miss Marple is shocked when her old friend Father Gorman is brutally murdered after visiting a dying parishioner. She is further surprised when she receives a letter from Gorman, sent moments before his death, which contains a list of names. When Detective Inspector Lejeune dismisses the list, Miss Marple is determined to seek justice for her friend herself. She finds another copy of the list at the parishioner's home, and a clue which leads her to The Pale Horse, an inn run by three modern-day witches who claim to be able to kill using black magic. While in the area, she attends a ritual 'burning' in memory of famous witch Goody Carne and meets locals including folklore historian Mark Easterbrook. Then a guest at The Pale Horse is found dead, and Miss Marple fears there may be worse to come. She must go to dangerous lengths to uncover the truth behind the mystery. Is magic really someone's weapon of choice or is there something even more sinister at work?

programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about two crime-solving gardeners. However, events take a darker turn when Donald Westward, Gloria's rival for village organiser, is found dead and his garden wrecked - all fingers point to Barry and Tracey Skinner, the local builder and his wife, while the scruffy and rustic Judd is acting suspiciously. Meanwhile, Donald's wife Norah believes that her husband was having an affair with Vilma Hockham, a new arrival from South Africa - was his death an accident, or is someone targeting the contestants as well as sabotaging their gardens?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When council clerk Martin Barrett is shot dead, Barnaby and Jones discover that he was an expert blackmailer. Why are Richard and Maggie Florian spending so much time at sea - and could police committee chairman Sir John Waverley have a scandalous past? With the help of a former policeman turned fisherman, Barnaby takes to the waves to find out.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Midsomer Worthy choir, which includes Joyce Barnaby, are in fear for their lives when baritone Connor Simpson is killed days before a competition - Barnaby and Jones investigate in an atmosphere of bitter rivalry and tense marital relationships before birdwatcher Sam Judd is shot dead. programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.desc: Classic musical adventure film starring Dick Van Dyke and Sally Ann Howes, 1968. A down-on-his-luck inventor turns a broken-down Grand Prix car into a fun vehicle for his children. [S,AD]

programme.title: Carry On Girls
programme.desc: Bawdy British comedy. In one of the later Carry On films, local businessman and councillor Sidney Fiddler convinces the town council of a rundown seaside resort to stage a beauty contest by persuading them that it will be a marvellous publicity stunt - however, the idea meets with fervent opposition from the local Women's Liberation group, who are led by the fearsome Councillor Prodworthy, as they attempt to sabotage the contest.

programme.title: Carry On Again Doctor
programme.desc: British comedy. When Dr Nookey is disgraced and sent to a remote island hospital in the South Seas, he stumbles upon a shaman's weight-reducing potion that is given to him by Gladstone Screwer, one of the members of staff at the hospital. Realising the potential of the potion, Dr Nookey returns to England with the aim of making a fortune, but other interested parties want to cash in on his good fortunes, and others still just want him brought down a peg or two.

programme.title: Goodnight Mister Tom
programme.desc: World War II drama in which a curmudgeonly widower living in a small village takes in a painfully shy evacuee from London. The widower soon realises that his young charge has been damaged both mentally and physically at the hands of his strict mother. He sets about undoing the damage, teaching the youngster to read, write and draw. But then the child is summoned back to the city.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A battle of the sexes which has raged in Broughton since the First World War comes to a head when ageing feminist Mildred Danvers is found dead after returning to her childhood home - as Barnaby investigates, misogynist vicar Reverend Gantis is shot through the head during a humiliating donkey race at the village fair. Is the killer on the side of the men or women, and do tragedies in Broughton's past hold the answer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. DCI Barnaby uncovers a seedy world of adultery and deceit within an affluent rural community when the body of arrogant local beauty Melissa Townsend is discovered by the pool at her manor house.

programme.title: Code of Silence (Signed Version)
programme.desc: The first episode of a suspenseful crime drama. Alison Brooks, a 29-year-old deaf woman, works in the canteen of Kent and Canterbury Police Station where her lipreading skills thrust her into a high-stakes police investigation - recruited by DI James Marsh and DS Ashleigh Francis, Alison assists in surveilling a gang planning a major heist. While navigating her mother's financial struggles, a broken relationship, and the ableist attitudes she encounters at work, Alison proves invaluable as she uncovers key gang members and their plans through her sharp observations - as Alison's involvement deepens, she infiltrates a gang-linked pub and meets Liam, the gang's anxious new tech recruit. Their undeniable chemistry complicates her mission as Alison takes bold risks to gather evidence - when a collision with Liam's car leads to a night spent in A and E together, Alison has to decide if she's going to come clean to the police about her actions or lie to conceal their connection.

programme.title: Code of Silence (Signed Version)
programme.desc: Suspenseful crime drama. Determined to keep her meeting with Liam secret, Alison doesn't tell the police about Liam taking her to A and E - meanwhile, tensions flare at the Canterbury Tap as Liam's arrival leads to a confrontation with Alison's ex Eithan, who pleads for a second chance. When the police do discover Alison's meeting with Liam, they fire her due to her reckless actions ... but Alison decides to take control of her own destiny as Liam invites her to a gang-linked meeting in London as a 'date' - observing vault plans being handed over to Liam by his contact Sammy, she relays critical intelligence to the police that earns her reinstatement as an informant. However, suspicion mounts when Braden catches Alison observing his meeting with Liam on the pub's CCTV and Liam searches Alison's phone for evidence - trapped between loyalty and danger, Alison realises she can't trust anyone... not even Liam.

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: The first episode of a drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. Spithead, Portsmouth, 1793 - a storm is raging in the English Channel and a small shore boat is being lashed by squally rain as two oarswomen battle against the waves. Huddled at the stern is a pale-faced 17-year-old making his maiden voyage to a career in the Royal Navy - soaked to the skin in his ill-fitting uniform, doctor's son Horatio Hornblower steps aboard his first ship, the HMS Justinian. This shy and stuttering seaman is set to become the most gallant and redoubtable figure in naval history, but his peers are wary of his intelligence and malicious Midshipman Jack Simpson adds the new recruit to his list of targets - when Simpson accuses Hornblower of cheating at cards, Hornblower snaps and challenges Simpson to a duel to settle their differences once and for all. The other men think Horatio is mad, but they also think they know that Simpson is the best shot in the navy...

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack hosts another edition in the second series of the show. The 1 Club is the ultimate leveller - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes, because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts... they're all about logic and common sense. It doesn't matter if you're 15 or 50 - this is the quiz that the whole family can play together. 100 contestants begin every show, but who will make it to the end and answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right... and win up to 100,000 pounds?

programme.desc: A military unit fights a powerful, out-of-control supercomputer and scientists who have mutated into flesh-eating creatures.

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: In this gripping film, Lin Shaye reprises her role as parapsychologist Dr. Elise Rainier, who returns to her family home to face the unrelenting demons that have plagued her since childhood.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: After waking from a coma, a man discovers that a deadly infection has turned most humans into ferocious beings, pushing him to struggle for survival and seek refuge in a shattered world.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programme.desc: A Genetically Created Anaconda, Cut In Half, Regenerates Itself Into Two Aggressive Giant Snakes, Due To The Blood Orchid.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: Bea and Ben's romance cooled after a hot start. Reunited at a wedding in Australia, they pretend to be a couple. Old feelings return, giving them another shot at love.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels' quest to find two rings leads them to a Mongolian outpost where they uncover a dark secret.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: John leads human resistance against Skynet and its army of Terminators after much of humanity is destroyed in a nuclear holocaust.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Peter Parker grapples with his dual identity as a teenager and the burgeoning superhero, Spider-Man, balancing the extraordinary with the ordinary challenges of youth.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary crew travelling through the Amazon picks up a stranded man whose hobby is to capture the giant Anaconda snake.

programme.title: Kraven The Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven, driven by vengeance and shaped by his father's cruelty, becomes the world's most feared hunter. His journey blurs the line between justice and obsession as he seeks redemption.

programme.title: Men In Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J travels in time to MIB's early days in 1969 to stop an alien from assassinating his friend Agent K and changing history.

programme.title: Drunken Master
programme.desc: An undisciplined boy must learn Drunken Fist Kung Fu in order to stop an assassin.Star: Jackie Chan

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: A single mother inherits a farmhouse and uncovers her family's connection to the legendary Ghostbusters, revealing a supernatural legacy.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: A shrewd young man and a masterful treasure hunter put aside their differences to find a lost ancient fortune dating back 500 years.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: Underdogs risk everything to compete in the world's top sport.

programme.title: Don't Breathe
programme.desc: A group of friends break into the house of a wealthy blind man, thinking they'll get away with the perfect heist. They're wrong.

programme.title: The Pope'S Exorcist
programme.desc: Glimpses of the events that exorcist father Gabriele Amorth's experiences while assisting a possessed child and revealing a conspiracy that has been kept secret within the Vatican for years.

programme.title: Xxx: State Of The Union
programme.desc: Darius Stone, a rebellious new agent, dives into a political conspiracy in Washington, racing to stop an assassination and expose dangerous truths at the top.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A troubled teen learns discipline and courage through martial arts training, finding purpose and respect under an unconventional mentor.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: A heartfelt story of four sisters growing up, exploring love, ambition, and family bonds as they navigate life's challenges and pursue their dreams.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Driven by a rare blood disorder, Dr. Morbius takes a desperate risk to save others, unknowingly unleashing a dark force within himself.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Drac's pack is back for a brand new adventure! And this time with a new little addition - Drac's half-human and half-vampire grandson.

programme.title: Brightburn
programme.desc: What if a child from another world crash landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister?

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride Or Die
programme.desc: Miami detectives, defying protocol, investigate their captain's murder, uncovering a dangerous conspiracy of corruption and cartel involvement, seeking justice and vindication.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: Robert McCall returns to Southern Italy to find his friends under the control of mafia crime bosses. He becomes their protector, risking everything to fight back against the mafia.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Stunt biker Johnny is the devil's bounty hunter by night. Can he redeem his soul by fighting Blackheart, the devil's wayward son?

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: An enormous radioactively mutated lizard runs rampant on the island of Manhattan.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Terrorists attempt to kidnap a wealthy child. Their plan is foiled when a deadly black mamba is sent instead of a harmless snake.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: General Cypher and his son crashland on Earth 1000 years after cataclysmic events forced humanity to abandon Earth for a new planet.

programme.title: The Unholy
programme.desc: The Unholy is a supernatural horror about a deaf girl who, after a visit from a spirit she believes to be the Virgin Mary, suddenly speaks and heals others, but dark, sinister forces are at play.

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: A father's relentless hunt for his missing child leads him into a web of crime and deception, testing his resolve and faith.

programme.title: Daddio
programme.desc: A random taxi chat after leaving the airport grows important. The passenger and driver see their lives differently now, realizing these meetings happen for a reason.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago.

programme.title: Don't Breathe 2
programme.desc: Norman Nordstrom has recreated the life stolen from him with the help of his beloved foster daughter, Phoenix. But when Phoenix is abducted, Norman taps into his darker instincts to save his daughter.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A chauvinist puts a romantically challenged producer through a series of outrageous tests to prove his theories about relationships.

programme.title: Harold & The Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Harold, who can make drawings come alive in a book, becomes a real-world adult and learns he has to understand more about everyday real life.

programme.title: Bekhudi
programme.desc: Radhika is all set to marry Vicky, chosen by her parents. All is well, until she meets Rohit and both are attracted toward each other.

programme.title: Dil Ka Kya Kasoor
programme.desc: Arun, a talented singer, gains fame for Seema's lyrics, though they've never met. When they finally meet, their encounter unravels unexpected emotions, leading to a deep connection between them.

programme.title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
programme.desc: Preeti courageously shares her story in court but faces backlash when the perpetrator strikes again. Now, she's not only battling her trauma but also dealing with her family's rejection.

programme.title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
programme.desc: Akshay teams up with Maya's gang to search for his missing brother, showcasing his wrestling skills to earn her trust while preparing to confront his fierce rival..

programme.title: Prem Rog
programme.desc: Devdhar vows to bring happiness back in Manorama's life after she is widowed. This leads him to face the wrath of his family and his villagers.

programme.title: Khilona Bana Khalnayak
programme.desc: A ventriloquist's doll seems to come alive and commits a lot of crimes. Will the ventriloquist be able to prove his innocence?

programme.title: Lakshya
programme.desc: Karan, a free spirit, makes a snap decision to join the army. As he navigates the tough challenges ahead, he strives to prove his worth and find his place.

programme.title: Dance Party
programme.desc: Sweety questions her love after seeing Sanjay's true colors at a party.

programme.title: RRR
programme.desc: Starring: N. T. Rama Rao Jr.,Ram Charan. A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonali Bendre. A joint Indian family faces trials as Ramkishen and Mamta raise their children. Mamta's ambition drives a division, but her sons oppose her, leading to family conflict and revelations.

programme.title: Dabangg 3
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. ASP Chulbul Pandey balances family and bombastic crime-fighting until a returning enemy jeopardizes his hard-earned life, posing a threat.

programme.title: Radhe: Your Most Wanted Bhai
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Disha Patani. Radhe, a daredevil encounter specialist of the Mumbai Police force, vows to knock down the crime syndicate led by an evil drug lord.

programme.title: Vettaiyan The Hunter
programme.desc: Starring: Rajinikanth,Amitabh Bachchan. A Veteran cop, delivers swift justice to criminals. When a teacher is murdered, he races to find the killer while facing truth, guilt, and corruption.

programme.title: Yuvarathnaa
programme.desc: Starring: Puneeth Rajkumar,Sayyeshaa. Amid education privatization, RK College faces closure. Determined, the principal and a student, Yuva, unite, striving to save their beloved institution against all odds.

programme.title: Raja Saheb Ka Kamra
programme.desc: Starring: Ashwin Babu,Dhanya Balakrishna. Raghav enters a haunted reality show, not for fame but answers. As cameras roll, he digs into the chilling mystery of his brother's death, where every clue leads deeper into darkness.

programme.title: Police Power
programme.desc: Starring: Vijay Antony,Nivetha Pethuraj. Murugavel, a dedicated police officer, discovers his brother's criminal ties. As he intervenes to reform him, his brother turns against him, leading to a dangerous confrontation.
